constraints.name: positiveBudget
constraints.message: Total budget amount must be non-negative

constraints.name: warnOverBudgetItem
constraints.messageTemplate: Line item '{itemName}' is over budget by {variance}

constraints.name: warnBudgetIncrease
constraints.messageTemplate: Budget increasing by more than 25% (from {oldBudget} to {newBudget})

constraints.name: blockNoLineItems
constraints.messageTemplate: Cannot approve budget with no budgeted amount

constraints.name: blockFinalizeHighVariance
constraints.messageTemplate: Cannot finalize budget - variance ({variancePct}%) exceeds 20% threshold

value.value: Can only finalize draft or approved budgets

constraints.name: warnSignificantOverage
constraints.messageTemplate: Line item '{itemName}' actual exceeds budget by 50%+

policies.name: BudgetManagement
policies.message: Event coordinators and finance can manage budgets

policies.name: BudgetFinalize
policies.message: Only managers and finance can finalize budgets

policies.name: LineItemManagement
policies.message: Event coordinators and finance can manage line items
